user.name: Together AI
user.description: Accelerate inference, model shaping, and pre-training on a research-optimized platform.

fullText:
MiniMax-M3 from @MiniMax__AI is now available on Together AI.

It’s an open-weight native multimodal model with 1M context, MiniMax Sparse Attention, and thinking / non-thinking modes.

Together AI is MiniMax’s preferred cloud partner, with inference optimizations delivering up to 125% higher throughput across concurrency levels.

user.name: Together AI

fullText: When deploying voice agents, users notice latency above 500ms. Above one second, they hang up. @rish_bhargava  walks through the full pipeline at that level of specificity, including why 75ms of network latency adds 30% overhead and how colocating everything drops it to 5ms. https://t.co/s6yqpFpsaA

fullText:
In honor of Comrade Dario consolidating the means of AI production with Fable 5, here's a fun RTS game called Red Alert: Hard Takeoff 🚀

It's a mod of the 90s classic C&C Red Alert. Instead of Allies vs Soviets, it's OpenAI vs Anthropic. Basically you race to train AGI before the other side nukes you.

user.name: Databricks
user.description: Databricks is the Data and AI company, helping organizations build and scale data and AI apps, analytics and agents.

fullText:
Business users can already use Genie to ask descriptive questions in natural language. Now the same conversational workflow can support predictive analytics too.

By combining Databricks Genie, TabPFN, and Agent Bricks, teams can turn questions like “Which customers are likely to churn?” or “Which promotion is most likely to close this deal?” into predictive answers in seconds.

Instead of relying on specialized ML workflows and dedicated data science teams, the system dynamically assembles governed Lakehouse data and generates predictions within the same conversational experience.

https://t.co/eKfJGoHHxN
